title: Sous-vide Filipino Bean Sprouts Stir-fry
description: A buttery and juicy festive filipino dish featuring bean sprouts prepared sous-vide for optimal tenderness and flavor.

ingredients.name: Fish Sauce
ingredients.notes: use a low sodium version if necessary

ingredients.name: Minced Shallots
ingredients.notes: finely chopped for added depth of flavor

instructions: Place bean sprouts in a sous-vide bag, seal it properly and cook at 140°F for 30 minutes.
In a separate pan, heat up some oil over medium-high heat. Add minced shallots and garlic cloves until fragrant (about 2-3 minutes).
Add soy sauce and fish sauce to the pan with minced shallots and garlic, stir well to combine, let it simmer for another minute.
Gently fold in cooked bean sprouts into the sauce mixture, ensuring they are well coated. Let them cook together for an additional 2-3 minutes until heated through.
Remove from heat immediately after adding bean sprouts; allow a few moments for everything to meld before serving.
Just before serving, sprinkle chopped cilantro leaves over the stir-fried bean sprouts as a garnish.
